scripts.worker:dev: cd worker && npx wrangler dev --env dev --remote
scripts.worker:dev:init: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db-dev --remote --file=schema.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db-dev --remote --file=seed.sql
scripts.worker:dev:migrate: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db-dev --remote --file=migration.sql
scripts.worker:local:init: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db --local --file=schema.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db --local --file=seed.sql
scripts.worker:local:migrate: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db --local --file=migration.sql
scripts.worker:migrate:prod: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute waitlist-db --remote --file=migration.sql
